0.response: {"Q0":"Mainly I memorized the order for digging on the blue planet and the red planet according to numbers rather than the keys j, k, and l. So, in my head the red planet was 1, 3, 2 and the blue planet was 3, 1, 2 (with one being my index finger, two being my middle finger, and 3 being my ring finger.) It was just easier for me that way. For picking the galaxy, I just tried to go with whichever bar had more yellow rather than paying much attention to numbers because there wasn't really time for that."}

7.response: {"Q0":"Whichever bar had more yellow...there wasn't enough time to really scrutinize the decision."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, everything was extremely clear to me. "}

1.response: {"Q0":"No, not really. I settled on these pretty early and felt that they worked pretty well for me. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"No, I never tried digging on that planet after the astronaut left because I wouldn't be able to sell any gems I got and would just be wasting gold. "}

2.response: {"Q0":"I'd estimate maybe around 40% of the time. At the times it revealed whether or not I had gotten a gem, I was paying more attention to be ready to select the galaxy so I wouldn't miss the chance, it went by so fast. "}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, I didn't. I collected the gems I could still sell and took a chance on a few green ice as well."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I mostly focused on the planets and digging in the right order so I would waste as little gold as possible. Trying to focus on selecting galaxies only made me miss my chance entirely so I tried to quickly select whichever bar had more yellow. "}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I noticed right away which gem and planet it referred to and stopped digging on that planet so I didn't waste my gold. "}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, it was very clear to me. "}

11.response: {"Q0":"I feel that the instructions could have been a bit shorter. And while I realize that the one second for galaxy selection is most likely a feature of the study for a reason, it did feel too short for me to choose meaningfully. "}
